name: opencode-litellm-plugin
description: OpenCode plugin for LiteLLM — auto-discovers models, manages multiple servers, and supports reasoning variants
author: Dan Jeffries

scripts.deploy: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const os = require('os'); const path = require('path'); const targetDir = path.join(os.homedir(), '.config', 'opencode', 'plugins'); fs.mkdirSync(targetDir, { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync(path.join('dist', 'index.js'), path.join(targetDir, 'litellm.js'));"
